chapter_title.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ اللَّهَ إِنَّمَا يُعْطِي الدِّينَ مَنْ يُحِبُّهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 95 – Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, rather, Gives the Religion to the one whom He<sup>azwj</sup> Loves

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (160/ 9)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (160/ 9)
text: إِنَّ هَذِهِ الدُّنْيَا يُعْطِيهَا اللَّهُ الْبَرَّ وَ الْفَاجِرَ وَ لَا يُعْطِي الْإِيمَانَ إِلَّا صَفْوَتَهُ مِنْ خَلْقِهِ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Moalla, from Al Washa, from Abdul Kareem Bin Amro Al Khash’amy, from Umar Bin Hanzala, and from Haza Bin Humran, from Humran,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘This world, Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Gives it to the righteous and the immoral, and (but) He<sup>azwj</sup> does not Give the Eman except to His<sup>azwj</sup> from His<sup>azwj</sup> creatures’.
en.sarwar: 3. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from Mu’alla from al- Washsha’ from ‘Abd al-Karim ibn ‘Amr al-Khath’ami from ‘Umar ibn Hanzalah and Hamza ibn Humran from abu Ja’far (a.s.) who has said the following: “Allah gives this world to both the virtuous and evil-doing people, but He does not give belief to anyone except to His chosen creatures.”
